hEDS: ("hypermobile Ehlers-Danlos" OR "hypermobility spectrum disorder") AND (collagen OR tenascin OR diagnosis OR management)
POTS_exercise: "postural orthostatic tachycardia" AND (exercise OR recumbent OR Levine OR rehabilitation OR deconditioning)
POTS_treatment: "postural orthostatic tachycardia" AND (ivabradine OR propranolol OR midodrine OR fludrocortisone OR treatment)
MCAS: "mast cell activation" AND (tryptase OR cromolyn OR ketotifen OR diagnosis OR criteria)
OSA: "obstructive sleep apnea" AND ("CPAP adherence" OR "intermittent hypoxia" OR cognitive OR cardiovascular)
ADHD_guanfacine: guanfacine AND (ADHD OR "attention deficit") AND ("heart rate" OR "blood pressure" OR cardiovascular OR tolerability)
OCD_ERP: "obsessive compulsive disorder" AND ("exposure and response prevention" OR fluvoxamine OR SSRI)
Hashimoto: ("Hashimoto" OR "autoimmune hypothyroidism") AND ("desiccated thyroid" OR liothyronine OR levothyroxine OR T3)
collagen_loading: collagen AND tendon AND (synthesis OR "vitamin C" OR loading OR gelatin)
neuroconnective: ("joint hypermobility" OR "Ehlers-Danlos") AND (anxiety OR autonomic OR neurodevelopmental OR ADHD OR autism)
